description: This file defines a Flutter widget for displaying detailed information about a specific tale, including loading the tale data asynchronously via a repository, handling loading and error states, and providing navigation to a tale player screen.

classes.name: TaleDetailScreen
classes.description: A StatefulWidget that displays details of a tale based on an ID, including loading state management.

classes.name: _TaleDetailScreenState
classes.description: State class managing the loading, error handling, and rendering of the tale detail UI.

classes.name: _Pill
classes.description: A custom StatelessWidget to display category, age group, duration, and featured status as styled pills.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes the state and triggers the tale data loading.

methods.name: _load
methods.description: Asynchronously fetches the tale data from the repository and updates the UI state accordingly.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI, rendering loading indicator, error message, or tale details.

methods.name: _Pill
methods.description: Builds a visual pill component with specified text and background color.
